titleStmt.title: SII 40.178: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 178. (A.R. No. B. 313 of 1931.) Pasuvēmula, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab built into the celling of the dilapidated Vishṇu temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1560, Vyaya, Mārgaśira, ba. 7.

Registers the grant of land by Kāvūri Veṅkaṭādri-Nāyaniṁgāru of the Veligaṇḍla-gōtra to the temple of Paṭṭābhirāmabhadrasvāmi at Paśvēmula in the Nāgārjunikoṇḍa-sīma, which was the yijārati of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayādbhudaya śālivā
hana śakavaraṣaṁbulu
1560 Agunēṭi veyanāma
saṁvvatsara mārggaśira ba 7 lu
śrī Akhilāṁḍḍakōṭi braṁ
hmāṁḍanāyakulaina paśvē
mula paṭṭābhirāma bhadra svāmulaku
veligaṁḍla gōtrōdbhavulaina veṁkkanaṁgāri pau
tṛluṁnnuceṁnnappaṁgāri putṛluṁnnu Ai
na kāvūri veṁkkaṭādri nāyaniṁgāru daṁ
ṇḍaṁ veṭi samarpiṁcina bhūdāna dharma śā
sanakramaṁmeṭlaṁnnanu māyi jārati
sāgivaccē nāgārjuni koṁḍḍa śīmalō pa
śvēmula grāmāna vūriki Uttarappōla
ṁlōnu kaṭṭuva doḍḍi ceni sthaḷaṁ tūrppu
naku buyyana pegaḍavāri cēnikarānu da
kṣaṇānaku vāṇiki mānu cēnikarānu pa
ḍamaṭiki teṭṭikuṁṭacēnikarānu vuttarā
naku kaṭṭuvānu yī madhyē peddareṁḍḍu
kuccaḷḷa polamuṁnnuceruvu kiṁda vari
polaṁ Ārimi vūriki dakṣaṇaṁ māci
kuṁṭa vārimaḍi penayeṁdumu vittanāla
pōlamuṁnnu yī tathāti puṇyakālama
ṁddu dhārāgrahitaṁggānu parva paḍitarā
naku samarppaṇa sēsimi dēvaḷaṁ gavana kāśe bellaṁko
ṁḍa vīrābattuḍu kapodiṁgāri mānyeṁ
tūrppukuṁṭacēnu muppātika polaṁ
dēvādula marri paḍamara yiddumu
vittula varipolamuṁnnu Ācaṁdrārkka
sthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcēdi . dāna
pālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnu
pālanaṁ dānāsvarggamavāpnōti
pālanādacyutaṁppadaṁ . veṁkka
ṭādri yerike .
Digital edition of SII 40.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
